title: Intelligence Files Starter Brief
label: Agency opt-in
summary: A declassified-history starter brief for readers entering the intelligence dossiers, agency maps, source-methodology pages, and public-record archive routes.
boundary: Lead magnets are public orientation assets with a seven-day intelligence window. They do not increase evidence strength or replace trust/privacy pages.
promise: Get the agency archive route: how to enter declassified files, separate official record from inference, and move into the intelligence dossier reading path.
readerOutcome: The reader can start researching agency files without treating every declassified fragment as a complete conclusion.
whatYouLearn: Which archive routes matter first: declassified files, oversight records, agency releases, and public dockets.
How to separate source, inference, allegation, and conclusion.
How the Intelligence Dossiers series is organised as a reading path.
Why the source-methodology page is the safety rail for darker material.
checklist: Open the declassified archive evidence lane.
Use the Intelligence offer route for the complete path.
actionSteps: Move into the Intelligence Dossiers offer.
nextBestStep: Enter the Intelligence Dossiers offer path.
